positive: A majestic, highly stylized celestial fox silhouette, posed dynamically amongst blooming crystalline flowers and nebular dust. The composition must be centered and balanced, designed for wearable art. Use strong, deep indigo and cosmic sapphire tones contrasted with luminous gold accents and emerald green highlights. Clean line art and high contrast are paramount. The aesthetic should blend Art Deco geometry with mystical fantasy. Vector illustration quality, seamless repeat potential, maximal detail, dramatic backlighting, symmetrical balance, suitable for t-shirt graphic.
